reasoning: As of November 9, 2025, Apple has not officially announced or released the Vision Pro 2. Reputable Apple news sources, such as MacRumors reporting on October 11, 2025, indicate that the future of the Vision Pro line is uncertain and development of the Vision Pro 2 has seemingly been paused or delayed to as late as 2028. Since Apple typically announces new major hardware for the holiday season by October at the latest, the lack of any official announcement by November effectively rules out a release by the end of the year. Therefore, it is highly unlikely that the Apple Vision Pro 2 will be released by December 31, 2025.
